# SandHere - Building Materials Marketplace
# Full-stack Requirements (Flutter + Laravel 11 + PostgreSQL + Reverb)
# Generated by BLACKBOXAI from pubspec.yaml, composer.json, configs

## [BACKEND] Laravel 11 (PHP) - Deploy First
PHP: ^8.2
Composer Dependencies (../Herd/sandbackend/composer.json):
  laravel/framework: ^12.0
  laravel/reverb: ^1.8
  laravel/sanctum: ^4.2
  laravel/tinker: ^2.10.1
  railsware/mailtrap-php: ^3.10
  razorpay/razorpay: ^2.9
  resend/resend-laravel: ^1.3
Dev Dependencies:
  fakerphp/faker: ^1.23
  laravel/breeze: ^2.3
  laravel/pail: ^1.2.2
  laravel/pint: ^1.24
  laravel/sail: ^1.41
  mockery/mockery: ^1.6
  nunomaduro/collision: ^8.6
  phpunit/phpunit: ^11.5.3
Node.js: ^20+ (Vite/Reverb dev server)

## [DATABASE] PostgreSQL 15+
- pgsql driver (config/database.php)
- PostGIS extension (lat/lng distance_km)

## [SERVICES & ENV VARS] (.env required)
### Mail Config (config/mail.php)
```
MAIL_MAILER=smtp  # or resend, log
MAIL_HOST=mailtrap.io  # or smtp.gmail.com, resend.com
MAIL_PORT=2525
MAIL_USERNAME=your_api_key
MAIL_PASSWORD=your_password
MAIL_ENCRYPTION=tls
MAIL_FROM_ADDRESS=noreply@sandhere.com
MAIL_FROM_NAME="SandHere"
```

### Reverb WebSocket (config/reverb.php + broadcasting.php)
```
REVERB_APP_ID=sandhere
REVERB_APP_KEY=z7jb69t7onshtuge4biw
REVERB_APP_SECRET=your_secret
REVERB_HOST=sandbackend.yourdomain.com
REVERB_PORT=443
REVERB_SCHEME=https

BROADCAST_CONNECTION=reverb  # config/broadcasting.php
```
- Run: `php artisan reverb:start --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8080 --hostname=sandbackend.yourdomain.com`
- Scaling: Redis (optional for production)

### Other Services
- Razorpay Sandbox: Get API keys from dashboard
- Queue: `php artisan queue:work` (for notifications)
- CORS: `config/cors.php` → allowed_origins = ['https://yourfrontend.com']

## [DEPLOYMENT] Backend First (Nixpacks ready)
1. cd ../Herd/sandbackend
2. composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader
3. cp .env.example .env && php artisan key:generate
4. php artisan migrate --force
5. php artisan reverb:start (or supervisor)
6. Deploy: Nixpacks/Railway/Heroku (nixpacks.toml configured)

## [SYSTEM/TOOLS]
- PHP 8.2+, Composer 2.7+
- PostgreSQL 15+, Node 20+
- Git, Nixpacks CLI (optional)

Backend ready → point Flutter app_config.dart BACKEND_HOST to deployed URL
